use serde_json::Value;

// BAD: cloning serde_json::Value in loop
fn extract_fields(data: &Value, fields: &[&str]) -> Vec<Value> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for field in fields {
        if let Some(value) = data.get(field) {
            results.push(value.clone()); // clones Value in loop
        }
    }
    results
}

fn merge_configs(base: &Value, overrides: &[Value]) -> Value {
    let mut result = base.clone();
    for override_val in overrides {
        if let Value::Object(map) = override_val {
            for (key, value) in map {
                result[key] = value.clone(); // clones Value in loop
            }
        }
    }
    result
}
